reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena. Lo único malo es que el baño es muy chiquito y hay uno solo habilitado, lo que dificulta el acceso cuando hay mucha gente. Al llenarse de gente la atención es lenta y nos paso que esperamos mas de 40 minutos para desayunar y veiamos como personas que llegaron despues qur nosotros salian con sus cafes mientras nosotros seguiamos esperando, pero se entiende cuando hay mucha gente que estás cosas pasen.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good. The only downside is that the bathroom is very small and there's only one available, which makes it difficult to access when it's busy. When it gets crowded, service is slow, and we had to wait over 40 minutes for breakfast. We watched as people who arrived after us left with their coffees while we were still waiting. But it's understandable when it's busy, these things happen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNidHZEQ0JBEAE
